title: Changelog Entry
description: Shape of a deep-ai-council skill changelog entry (e.g. changelog/v2.1.0.0.md). Per sk-doc changelog convention the markdown file has NO frontmatter and NO version header — it starts directly with the summary paragraph and uses '#### Category' subsections. This schema captures the logical fields embedded in that structure for validation purposes.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the changelog entry

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what changed and why it matters (the opening paragraph of the changelog file)

breaking.description: True if any change in this entry breaks backward compatibility

fixed.description: Bug fixes (with reference to audit-finding IDs where relevant)

audit_finding_refs.description: Optional list of audit-finding IDs resolved or deferred in this version

examples.summary: Release-cleanup pass against current sk-doc templates and HVR standards. README rewritten to marketing-leaning voice anchored at ~70% of Public/README.md intensity. Surgical alignment fixes across SKILL.md, references, feature catalog, and manual testing playbook. Smart Router (§3) preserved (untouched).

added: Release-cleanup spec folder at .opencode/specs/.../131/000/004-deep-ai-council with 4 JSON schemas and resource-map.yaml
changed: README.md full rewrite per skill_readme_template.md with HVR score >= 85
fixed: [N] structural deviations across references/ per audit-findings AF-XXXX
deferred: [K] P2 items deferred with rationale recorded in audit-findings.jsonl
